title: Expert citation + grounding audit of M1 batch (stratified, ≥95%)
context: An independent expert audit verifies that extracted assertions are faithful to their cited open sources and that entity grounding is correct. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Run a stratified expert citation + grounding audit of the M1 batch against the cited open sources, by an auditor independent of the extractor, requiring ≥95% verification and zero confirmed false ID mappings.
acceptanceCriteria: A stratified sample (min size ≥200 or whole release; strata by source and extraction method) is checked against the cited open source; ≥95% verify.
The auditor is independent of the extractor of the sampled records (no self-grading).
Entity grounding sampled separately: zero confirmed false ID mappings.
Citations checked are passage/record-level; collection-level citations rejected.
output: An audit report documenting sampling, results (≥95%), and grounding findings, committed via PR.
